text.title: inc-tool-tier-approval-gate Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for inc-tool-tier-approval-gate as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Granting "auto" status to a T2 tool because "the team trusts the agent now".
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Trust is not a property of the tool — it is a property of the action's blast radius. Failover and delete remain T2 forever; only the speed of approval improves.

failure-mode.description: Reusing the same approval token across "follow-up" actions in the same incident.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Each T2 action is a separate decision; "I approved a pod delete" is not "I approved a namespace delete" thirty seconds later.
